# desec_token_policy (List Resource)

Lists deSEC token scoping policies for a given API token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all policies for a given token
list "desec_token_policy" "all" {
  provider = desec
  config {
    token_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) The UUID of the token whose policies to list.
